ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "subject_no" TEXT /* Subject number of the course */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "ltp" TEXT /* Lecture-Tutorial-Practical format (e.g., 3-0-0) */,
  "credit" INTEGER /* Credits assigned to the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the course content */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Indicates the level of the course (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the university */,
  "program" TEXT /* The academic program the student is enrolled in (e.g., Computer Science, Mechanical Engineering) */,
  "major" TEXT /* The student's major */,
  "minor" TEXT /* The student's minor (if applicable) */,
  "current_semester" TEXT /* The current semester of the student (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the student (e.g., Active, On Leave, Graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that the student is enrolled in */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved by the student in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* The date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* The semester in which the student is enrolled in the course */,
  "course_year" INTEGER /* The academic year of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "grade_points" REAL /* Numerical value of the grade (e.g., 4.0 for A, 3.0 for B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the faculty member teaches */,
  "position" TEXT /* The position of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* The location of the faculty member's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the faculty member */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the faculty member */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* The date the faculty member was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dean of the department */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the department's main office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_dean_id FOREIGN KEY ("dean_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has prerequisites */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that is a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the prerequisite course and its relevance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the grade (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "grade_description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "grade_points" REAL /* Numerical value of the grade (e.g., 4.0 for A, 3.0 for B) */,
  "grade_scale" TEXT /* The grading scale used (e.g., A-F, 10-point scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_grade_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("grade_symbol") REFERENCES enrollments ("grade")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  "current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the academic year is the current one */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the academic year (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the course is scheduled */,
  "time_slot" TEXT /* Time slot for the course */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the course is held */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the course is held */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedule_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedule_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits earned by the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average of the student */,
  "total_courses" INTEGER /* Total number of courses completed by the student */,
  "total_grade_points" REAL /* Total grade points earned by the student */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative Grade Point Average of the student */,
  "current_gpa" REAL /* GPA for the current academic year or semester */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
